config.title: DKF_TITLE #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'nx_trace #include "50519"
'section_* #include "50222"
'qve_* #include "50200"
'operations row #include "50128"
'getCurrentRKS #include "50120"
'Bulid_Choicelist_Transakcja_Row #include "50634"
'selectfile #include "50123" #include "50126"
function fsearch() dim pSearchChoice : set pSearchChoice = doc_.getmodule(60115) pSearchChoice.addAdditionalWhere "N5DOWODKSIEG.pRejestrDok=" + CStr(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj) fsearch = pSearchChoice.std_search(page_) set pSearchChoice = nothing end function
private sub rebuild_configuration dim pConfigObject : set pConfigObject = nothing dim pConfigModule : set pConfigModule = nothing #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 rebuild_operation_buttons_n_2 page_.root.pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW2, pConfigObject, pConfigModule , 1 , 7, 6 #else rebuild_operation_buttons page_.root.pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, pConfigObject, pConfigModule #endif end sub
function cust_operation_hli(byref pHLI) std_cust_operation_hli pHLI,page_.root.pRejestrDok,page_.root,page_ end function
function fopen()
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE
#ifdef DKF_GOFIRST if not page_.cursoriter is nothing then page_.root.ignore=true silent_ffirst() end if #endif rebuild_configuration fopen = true end function
function foptions FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
if doc_.getmodule(60175).dok_rej_preferences(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ) then
FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
'apply settings rebuild_configuration end if end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
function fsave() NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Zachowanie danych",nothing)
dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='cust_operation_hli' vn1='STD_OPERATION_FSAVE'") std_cust_operation_hli hli,page_.root.pRejestrDok,page_.root,page_
fsave = not trans_.isdirty()
NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end function
function fdelete() NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Usuwanie danych",nothing)
fdelete = std_fdelete()
NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end function
QVE_NRDOK_FROM_REJESTR(CTRLID_NUMDOK,pRejestrDok,strNrDok) QVX_REJESTR_DOK(CTRLID_REJDOK) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_LBL_DOK_ZROD,wrefDokZrod) QVX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,pUzytRej,dk_pUzytModyf)
function c##CTRLID_TRANS_VAT##_ongetdata(oCtrl, iRow) : c##CTRLID_TRANS_VAT##_ongetdata = true
if page_.root.listDekret.exists(iRow) then dim oDekret : set oDekret = page_.root.listDekret.get(iRow) oCtrl.value = left(oDekret.dek_strExtras, 1) end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_TRANS_VAT##_ondataentered(oCtrl, iRow, vValue)
if page_.root.listDekret.exists(iRow) then dim oDekret : set oDekret = page_.root.listDekret.get(iRow) oDekret.dek_strExtras = oCtrl.value + mid(oDekret.dek_strExtras, 1) end if
end function
#macro VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS_IOW(_ctrl_,_field_) \ function c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata = true \ if row<>1 then \ if page_.root.listDekret.exists(row) then \ if page_.root.listDekret.get(row).strOpis = "" then \ page_.root.listDekret.get(row).strOpis = page_.root.listDekret.get(row-1).strOpis \ end if \ end if \ end if \ dim strTip : strTip = "" \ if page_.root.listDekret.exists(row) then \ dim pObj:set pObj = page_.root.listDekret.get(row) \ if pObj.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_AUTO then \ pCtrl.disable = true \ disable_konto pCtrl , true \ else \ pCtrl.disable = false \ disable_konto pCtrl , false \ end if \ if not pObj is nothing then \ pCtrl.value = ccur(pObj._field_) \ if pObj.pKonto is nothing then \ pCtrl.unit = "" \ pCtrl.precision = clng(2) \ else \ pCtrl.unit = pObj.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot \ pCtrl.precision = pObj.pKonto.pJednostka.nDokladnosc - 1 \ strTip = pObj.pKonto.strNazwa \ end if \ pCtrl.parent.parent.cell(2).element(2).tip = strTip \ exit function \ end if \ end if \ pCtrl.value = ccur(0) \ pCtrl.precision = clng(0) \ end function \ function c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered(ctrl, row, value) \ if page_.root.listDekret.exists(row) then \ dim pObj:set pObj = page_.root.listDekret.get(row) \ if not pObj is nothing then \ pObj._field_ = ccur(value) \ c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered = true \ exit function \ end if \ end if \ dim pNewPos : set pNewPos = page_.root.listDekret.AddNew() \ pNewPos._field_ = ccur(value) \ c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered = true \ end function
#macro VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS(_ctrl_,_field_) \ function c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata = true \ dim strTip : strTip = "" \ if page_.root.listDekret.exists(row) then \ dim pObj:set pObj = page_.root.listDekret.get(row) \ if pObj.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_AUTO then \ pCtrl.disable = true \ disable_konto pCtrl , true \ else \ pCtrl.disable = false \ disable_konto pCtrl , false \ end if \ if not pObj is nothing then \ pCtrl.value = ccur(pObj._field_) \ if pObj.pKonto is nothing then \ pCtrl.unit = "" \ pCtrl.precision = clng(2) \ else \ pCtrl.unit = pObj.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot \ pCtrl.precision = pObj.pKonto.pJednostka.nDokladnosc - 1 \ strTip = pObj.pKonto.strNazwa \ end if \ pCtrl.parent.parent.cell(2).element(2).tip = strTip \ exit function \ end if \ end if \ pCtrl.value = ccur(0) \ pCtrl.precision = clng(0) \ end function \ function c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered(ctrl, row, value) \ if page_.root.listDekret.exists(row) then \ dim pObj:set pObj = page_.root.listDekret.get(row) \ if not pObj is nothing then \ pObj._field_ = ccur(value) \ c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered = true \ exit function \ end if \ end if \ dim pNewPos : set pNewPos = page_.root.listDekret.AddNew() \ pNewPos._field_ = ccur(value) \ c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered = true \ end function
function disable_konto(byval pCtrl , bDisable) 'pobranie komórki z kontrolkami do wyboru konta dim cell:Set cell = pCtrl.parent.parent.cell(LP_COLUMN_KONTO) dim ctrl 'zablokowanie lub odblokowanie wszystkich for each ctrl in cell ctrl.disable = bDisable next end function
#ifndef _IOW VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS(CTRLID_KWOTA_WN,curWn) VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS(CTRLID_KWOTA_MA,curMa) #else VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS_IOW(CTRLID_KWOTA_WN,curWn) VBG_KWOTA_DEKRETU_HANDLERS_IOW(CTRLID_KWOTA_MA,curMa) #endif
function c##CTRLID_MAKE_FOOT_TRIGGER##_ongetdata(pCtrl)
make_grid_tfoot dim bZaksiegowane : bZaksiegowane = (page_.root.eStatus = N5_DEKRET_STATUS_ZAKS) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ZAKSIEGUJ).hide = bZaksiegowane #ifdef _IOW page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GRID_POZYCJE).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ).disable = bZaksiegowane #ifdef DKF_SHOW_DATA_KSIEG page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_KSIEG).disable = bZaksiegowane #endif page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_REJE).disable = bZaksiegowane
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW).disable = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UWAGI).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_REJDOK).disable = bZaksiegowane #else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_NUMDOK).disable = bZaksiegowane #ifdef DKF_SHOW_DOK_ZROD page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DOK_ZRODLOWY).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_IMG_DOK_ZRODLOWY).disable = bZaksiegowane #endif page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GRID_POZYCJE).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ).disable = bZaksiegowane #ifdef DKF_SHOW_DATA_KSIEG page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_KSIEG).disable = bZaksiegowane #endif page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA_REJE).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW).disable = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UWAGI).disable = bZaksiegowane page_.ctrl(CTRLID_REJDOK).disable = bZaksiegowane #endif page_.cmdenabled CMD_SAVEFORM, not bZaksiegowane page_.cmdenabled CMD_DELETEFORM, not bZaksiegowane end function
function c##CTRLID_NR_DZIENNIK##_ongetdata(pCtrl) pCtrl.value = page_.root.text end function
dim nLastChangeNr : nLastChangeNr = -1 dim nLastChangeIdObj : nLastChangeIdObj = 0
function make_grid_tfoot
if nLastChangeIdObj <> page_.rootidobj then nLastChangeNr = -1 'reset nLastChangeIdObj = page_.rootidobj end if dim pSumator : set pSumator = page_.root.n5dowodksieg_get_sumator()
'check if need update if pSumator.get_change_nr() <= nLastChangeNr then exit function end if
nLastChangeNr = pSumator.get_change_nr()
dim pTableFoot:set pTableFoot = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GRID_POZYCJE).footer
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GRID_POZYCJE)).section_foot.removeall
dim iter : iter = 0
dim idUnit, curSumaWn, curSumaMa, nRef do while pSumator.get_value(iter,idUnit,curSumaWn,curSumaMa,nRef) if nRef > 0 then pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_GRID_FOOTER dim strUnit if idUnit <> 0 then strUnit = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,idUnit).strSkrot else strUnit = "<brak>" end if pTB.newcell with pTB.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .styleitem = STYLE_PAGE .borderwidth = 1 .border = 1 end with #ifdef _ALMA_TREND dim curSumaWnBil, curSumaMaBil, curSumaWnPozBil, curSumaMaPozBil pSumator.get_value_bil iter,idUnit,curSumaWnBil,curSumaMaBil,nRef pSumator.get_value_pozbil iter,idUnit,curSumaWnPozBil,curSumaMaPozBil,nRef
pTB.newcell.addtext("Suma bil ("+strUnit+")") #else pTB.newcell.addtext("Suma ("+strUnit+")") #endif
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .align = ALIGN_RIGHT #ifdef _ALMA_TREND .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaWnBil,strUnit) #else .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaWn,strUnit) #endif .size = 12 .border = 0 end with
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .align = ALIGN_RIGHT #ifdef _ALMA_TREND .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaMaBil,strUnit) #else .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaMa,strUnit) #endif .size = 12 .border = 0 end with with pTB.newcell.cell #ifdef ENABLE_DB14 .colspan = 3 #else .colspan = 2 #endif .styleitem = STYLE_PAGE .borderwidth = 1 .border = 1 end with
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_GRID_FOOTER pTB.newcell with pTB.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .styleitem = STYLE_PAGE .borderwidth = 1 .border = 1 end with pTB.newcell.addtext("Suma pozbil ("+strUnit+")") pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaWnPozBil,strUnit) .size = 12 .border = 0 end with
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .text = doc_.afc.display.money(curSumaMaPozBil,strUnit) .size = 12 .border = 0 end with with pTB.newcell.cell .colspan = 2 .styleitem = STYLE_PAGE .borderwidth = 1 .border = 1 end with #endif
end if
iter = iter + 1 loop end function
function c##CTRLID_AUTO_INFO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_AUTO_INFO##_ongetdata=true dim strInfo if page_.root.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_AUTO then strInfo = "automatyczny" else strInfo = "ręczny" end if strInfo = strInfo + "; Status: " if page_.root.eStatus = N5_DEKRET_STATUS_BUFOR then strInfo = strInfo + "bufor" else strInfo = strInfo + "zaksięgowany" end if oCtrl.text = strInfo end function
function zaksieguj_dowod
dim eOldStatus : eOldStatus = page_.root.eStatus page_.root.eStatus = clng(N5_DEKRET_STATUS_ZAKS) if not fsave() then page_.root.eStatus = eOldStatus end if end function
function automat_przeksiegowan dim choice:choice = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR,"Automaty przeksięgowań","strNazwa","pRejestrDok="+cstr(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj),"","") if choice = 0 then exit function end if dim pSchemat: set pSchemat = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR,choice) dim bOK trans_.autorollback false pSchemat.n5schematdekr_run nothing,page_.root,bOK end function
function copy_dowod if not fsave() then exit function end if
doc_.postcommand doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,0,USAGE_VIEW) appvar_pop_dow_ksieg=%1 appvar_dziennik_dk=%2 ") _ .add(page_.root.idobj).add(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj).done() end function
function storno_dowod if not fsave() then exit function end if
doc_.postcommand doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,0,USAGE_VIEW) appvar_pop_dow_ksieg=%1 appvar_dziennik_dk=%2 ") _ .add(-page_.root.idobj).add(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj).done() end function
function import_from_txt_file
dim strPath strPath=SelectFile("c:\", "*.txt", "")
if (len(strPath)=0) then exit function end if
dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pStream.attach strPath dim strTxt : strTxt = pStream.getstring() dim arrLines : arrLines = split(strTxt,vbCrLf) dim iLine '0-th line -> header
for iLine = 1+SKIP_LINES to UBound(arrLines) dim arrFields : arrFields = split(arrLines(iLine), TEXT_FIELD_SEPARATOR) if UBound(arrFields) >= 3+SKIP_FIELDS then dim strKonto '[0] dim curWinien '[1] dim curMa '[2] dim strOpis '[3]
strKonto = trim(arrFields(0+SKIP_FIELDS)) curWinien = Str2Cur(replace(replace(arrFields(1+SKIP_FIELDS)," ",""),"""","")) curMa= Str2Cur(replace(replace(arrFields(2+SKIP_FIELDS)," ",""),"""","")) strOpis = replace(arrFields(3+SKIP_FIELDS),"""","")
dim idKonto : idKonto = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KONTO, "strSymbol='"+ doc_.afc.convert.str2SQL(strKonto)+ "'") if idKonto <= 0 then trans_.message 0,0,"Nie znaleziono konta o symbolu " + strKonto 'exit function end if if page_.root.listDekret.count() < iLine-SKIP_LINES then page_.root.listDekret.addnew() end if
dim oDekret set oDekret = page_.root.listDekret.get(iLine-SKIP_LINES) if idKonto > 0 then set oDekret.pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO, idKonto) end if oDekret.curWn = curWinien oDekret.curMa = curMa oDekret.strOpis = strOpis end if next
end function
function c##CTRLID_KWOTA_WN##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,nRow,pCmdList) doc_.getmodule(60278).cmdlist_add_wyrownanie_dow_ksieg page_.root,nRow,pCmdList,"set_kwotawn", true end function
function c##CTRLID_KWOTA_MA##_oncmdlist(pCtrl,nRow,pCmdList) doc_.getmodule(60278).cmdlist_add_wyrownanie_dow_ksieg page_.root,nRow,pCmdList,"set_kwotama", false end function
function set_kwotawn(byref pHLI) dim nRow : nRow = pHLI.prop(1) dim curKwota : curKwota = pHLI.prop(2) if page_.root.listDekret.exists(nRow) then page_.root.listDekret.get(nRow).curWn = curKwota end if end function
function set_kwotama(byref pHLI) dim nRow : nRow = pHLI.prop(1) dim curKwota : curKwota = pHLI.prop(2) if page_.root.listDekret.exists(nRow) then page_.root.listDekret.get(nRow).curMa = curKwota end if end function
function c##CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,nRow,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin)
dim pPos:set pPos = nothing if page_.root.listDekret.exists(nRow) then set pPos = page_.root.listDekret.get(nRow) else exit function end if
dim strPodmiotPart if not pPos.pKonto is nothing then if not pPos.pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach is nothing then strPodmiotPart = "(n5transakcja.wrefPodmiot=" + cstr(pPos.pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach.idobj) + " and n5transakcja.wrefPodmiot_wrt=" + cstr(pPos.pKonto.wrefPodmiotRozrach.type) + ")" if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " + strPodmiotPart else strWhere = strPodmiotPart end if end if end if
end function
function przenies_do_bufora if not fsave() then exit function end if end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_AUTOMAT_PRZEKSIEGOWAN function automat_przeksiegowan_toral() dim pModRapEngine : set pModRapEngine = doc_.getmodule(60108) dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Z kont").bindexpr("strSymbol") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Na konto").bindexpr("strSymbol")
if pModRapEngine.show_raport_param_dialog(pParamArray,"Wybór kont") = 0 then exit function end if
'wybór kont z których ma być robione przeksięgowanie dim strSQL: strSQL = "select IdObj from n5konto where eAnalit = N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and %1 order by strSymbol" strSQL = pModRapEngine.query_apply_actual_param(strSQL,pParamArray)
'wybór konta na które ma być robione przeksięgowanie dim strWhere: strWhere = "%2" strWhere = pModRapEngine.query_apply_actual_param(strWhere,pParamArray) dim nIdKonto: nIdKonto = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KONTO,strWhere) if nIdKonto <= 0 then trans_.message 7000, 0, "Należy wybrać tylko jedno konto docelowe." exit function end if
dim pKontoWyn: set pKontoWyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,nIdKonto)
dim pPM : set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60159) dim pKontoInfoMan: set pKontoInfoMan = pPM.prepare_zois(getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),nothing,nothing,nothing,-1) dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL)
dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa tworzenie dekretów...") do while not oRS.EOF dim pKontoInfo: set pKontoInfo = pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(clng(oRS("IdObj"))) dim pKonto: set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,clng(oRS("IdObj")))
if pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn > ccur(0.0) or pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma > ccur(0.0) then 'strona Wn if pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn > ccur(0.0) then with page_.root.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKonto .curMa = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn .eTyp = clng(N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY) .strOpis = "Przeksięg. na wynik finansowy" end with with page_.root.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKontoWyn .curWn = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn .eTyp = clng(N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY) .strOpis = "Przeksięg. na wynik finansowy " + pKonto.strSymbol end with end if
'strona Ma if pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma > ccur(0.0) then with page_.root.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKonto .curWn = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma .eTyp = clng(N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY) .strOpis = "Przeksięg. na wynik finansowy" end with with page_.root.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKontoWyn .curMa = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma .eTyp = clng(N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY) .strOpis = "Przeksięg. na wynik finansowy " + pKonto.strSymbol end with end if end if
oRS.moveNext loop set pPerf = nothing end function #endif

body.p:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_PODSTAWOWE,Informacje podstawowe,FORM_SPAN)
QXR_INFO_CUSTOM(Sposób utworzenia: ,CTRLID_AUTO_INFO,FORM_SPAN)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef _IOW
#else Numer w dzienniku
#endif #ifdef DKF_SHOW_DATA_KSIEG QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data księgowania,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(CTRLID_DATA_KSIEG,dDataKsieg,1) #else
#endif
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Numer dokumentu,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_NUMDOK,32,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data rejestracji,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(CTRLID_DATA_REJE,dDataRej,1)
#ifdef DKF_SHOW_DOK_ZROD #ifndef _IOW
QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_LBL_DOK_ZROD,Dokument źródłowy,1) #ifdef _FRAM QXC_EDIT_WILDREF_EX(CTRLID_DOK_ZRODLOWY,40,PICTURE_WYBOR,wrefDokZrod,strNrDok;strNrDok;strTemat;idobj;strNrDok;strNrDok;strNrDok,pRejestrDok not in (select IdObj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA));;;;;;,RCELL_SPAN,CTRLID_IMG_DOK_ZRODLOWY) #else QXC_EDIT_WILDREF_EX(CTRLID_DOK_ZRODLOWY,40,PICTURE_WYBOR,wrefDokZrod,strNrDok;strNrDok;strTemat;idobj;strNrDok;strNrDok;strNrDok,;;;;;;,RCELL_SPAN,CTRLID_IMG_DOK_ZRODLOWY) #endif
#endif #endif
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_POZYCJE,Pozycje,FORM_SPAN)
listDekret
LP Konto(Symbol) Konto(nazwa) #ifdef _IOW Nr faktury Kwota winien Kwota ma Transakcja VAT #else Opis dekretu Kwota winien Kwota ma Transakcja #ifdef ENABLE_DB14 VAT #endif Kwalifikator #endif
SXC_LP
SXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KONTO,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_element_list_hli" vs1="listDekret" vs2="pKonto" vs3="eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and eAktywne=N5KONTO_AKTYWNE" vs4="",)
pKonto strSymbol CRSR_N5KONTO_ANALIT_AKTYW
SXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KONTO,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_element_list_hli" vs1="listDekret" vs2="pKonto" vs3="eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and eAktywne=N5KONTO_AKTYWNE" vs4="strNazwa",)
pKonto strNazwa CRSR_N5KONTO_ANALIT_AKTYW
#ifdef _IOW XG_EDIT_CELL(-1,strOpis,28) SXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KWOTA_WN,15,2,) SXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KWOTA_MA,15,2,)
SXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TRANSAKCJA,varFunctionHLI="std_choice_lst_cq_hli" vs1="pTransakcja" vs2="strSymTrans" vn3="CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA" vs4="listDekret" vs5="Bulid_Choicelist_Transakcja_Row" ,Wybór z listy) SXE_EDIT_REF_CQ(CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA,18,pTransakcja,strSymTrans)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB14
SXE_CHECKBOX_FIELD_CUSTOM(CTRLID_TRANS_VAT,)
#endif #else XG_EDIT_CELL(-1,strOpis,28) SXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KWOTA_WN,15,2,) SXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KWOTA_MA,15,2,)
SXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TRANSAKCJA,varFunctionHLI="std_choice_lst_cq_hli" vs1="pTransakcja" vs2="strSymTrans" vn3="CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA" vs4="listDekret" vs5="Bulid_Choicelist_Transakcja_Row" ,Wybór z listy) #ifdef _FRAM SXE_EDIT_REF(CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA,18,pTransakcja,strSymTrans,CRSR_N5TRANSAKCJA_WG_SYMBOLU_BEZ_DOSTAW) #else SXE_EDIT_REF_CQ(CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA,18,pTransakcja,strSymTrans) #endif
#ifdef ENABLE_DB14
SXE_CHECKBOX_FIELD_CUSTOM(CTRLID_TRANS_VAT,)
#endif XG_REF_CELL_ELEMENT(PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,14,pKwalifikator,strNazwa,CRSR_N5KWALIFIKATOR_WG_NAZWY,,listDekret) #endif
QXX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,pUzytRej,dk_pUzytModyf,2)
QXR_TEXT_REF_OPEN(Dziennik,CTRLID_REJDOK,-1,25,pRejestrDok,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strOpis,Opis,FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_REJESTRACJA,Operacje,FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef _FRAM
Przenieś do bufora
#else QXC_BUTTON(-1,0,Zaksięguj,varFunction="zaksieguj_dowod",1) #endif QXC_BUTTON(-1,0,Uruchom automat przeksięgowań,varFunction="automat_przeksiegowan",1)
Utwórz kopię
Utwórz storno #ifdef APPCONFIG_AUTOMAT_PRZEKSIEGOWAN QXE_BUTTON(-1,0,Automat przeksięgowań,varFunction="automat_przeksiegowan_toral") #endif
#ifdef _FRAM
QXC_BUTTON(-1,0,Zaksięguj,varFunction="zaksieguj_dowod",5)
#else #endif #ifdef SHOW_IMPORT_BUTON
Wczytaj z pliku
#endif QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_OPERATIONS_12(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW2,FORM_SPAN) #else QXX_OPERATIONS(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,FORM_SPAN) #endif
QXF_END
